column1: Urchin. You grew up in the merciless streets of a large city
Wanted. There's a price on your head
Cult Initiate. You know blasphemous secrets and rituals
Thieves' Guild. You have connections
Banished. Your people cast you out for supposed crimes
Orphaned. An unusual guardian rescued and raised you
Wizard's Apprentice. You have a knack and eye for magic
Jeweler. You can easily appraise value and authenticity
Herbalist. You know plants
Barbarian. You left the horde
column2: but it never quite left you

column1: Mercenary. You fought friend and foe alike for your coin
Sailor
column4: or merchant — the seas are yours.

column1: Acolyte. You're well trained in religious rites and doctrines
Soldier. You served as a fighter in an organized army
Ranger. The woods and wilds are your true home
Scout. You survived on stealth
Minstrel. You've traveled far with your charm and talent
Scholar. You know much about ancient history and lore
Noble. A famous name has opened many doors for you
Chirurgeon. You know anatomy
Hermit. The wilds (and its creatures) are your family
Outcast. You were thrown out for real or supposed crimes
Woodborn. They found you in the hollow of an oak tree
Amnesiac. Your past is a haze
Haunted. A restless spirit wants something from you
Fugitive. An anonymous savior helped you disappear
Feytouched. A fairy befriended you in your childhood
Witchborn. They burned your mother
Forager. You know how to find the edible and the deadly
Redeemer. You must redeem the name of your kin
Marked. You carry an eldritch mark. Is it a curse
Sacrifice. You were to be ritually sacrificed
Marooned. They left you behind
Fallen. You fell from grace. Will you atone
Drawn. You hear a whispered call and follow it
Ascetic. People fear you
Wolfchild. Long ago
column2: you walked into town wearing pelts

column1: Healer. You understand how life and death intertwine
Chosen. An eldritch being selected you for a purpose
Demonborn. An ancestor of yours is a powerful demon
Deserter. You abandonded your fellow soldiers.
Veteran. Once valorous
Impetuous. Someone told you you couldn't do it.
Natural Historian. You must document all of Nature's forms.
Collector. They call you obsessive but you just want a complete set.
New Life. You are trying to start a new life away from that which haunts you.
Amnesiac. You forgotten everything except your desire to go there...
Witness Protection. You were sent far away
Archaeologist. You are drawn to ancient civilizations. For knowledge!
Vagrant. Your home was destroyed and now you wander looking for a new one.
Runaway. Escaping your opressors your obligations: your old life.
Wretch. Anything is better than your former life of squalor and ignobility.
